title: Gender and International Security: Research & Analysis | CSIS
gist: This is a CSIS topic/section landing page for 'Gender and International Security', not a single article. It is a catalog of links to blog posts, podcasts, and past events (e.g. Ukrainian women in wartime society, women in African political office, a WTO Director-General conversation), with no standalone argument to mine. Card is intentionally light and honest.

themes.theme: Page is a topic index, not an article

insights.claim: The CSIS 'Gender and International Security' page is a section landing page aggregating links to blog posts, podcast episodes, and past events rather than a single analytical piece with an investable thesis.
insights.speaker: CSIS
insights.so_what: No tradable signal here; the underlying linked items (e.g. Ukraine women's wartime roles, WTO reform) would need to be sourced individually.
insights.quote: CSIS researchers use gender as a lens to better understand international relations and national security challenges
